briefdescription.para: eFuse control write locked
eFuse control write unlocked

sectiondef.header: Temperature limits definition for versal Efuses

briefdescription.para: Minimum temperature for full range check.
Maximum temperature for full range check.
Minimum temperature for low power range check.
Maximum temperature for low power range check.
Minimum temperature for medium power range check.
Maximum temperature for medium power range check.
Minimum temperature for high power range check.
Maximum temperature for high power range check.
To check both voltage and temperature in full range.
To check both voltage and temperature in low power range.
To check both voltage and temperature in medium power range.
To check both voltage and temperature in high power range.
Minimum voltage for low power range check.
Maximum voltage for low power range check.
Minimum voltage for medium power range check.
Maximum voltage for medium power range check.
Minimum voltage for high power range check.
Maximum voltage for high power range check.
System monitor lock code for eFUSE operations.
To check the corresponding protection eFuse is set or not.
eFuse read mode
eFuse program mode
eFuse read mode
eFuse program mode
Operation mode.
eFuse normal read
eFuse margin read
eFuse normal read
eFuse margin read
Read mode.
Efuse page 0.
Efuse page 1.
Efuse page 2.
eFuse Page
This function reloads the eFUSE cache, so that eFUSE values can be directly read from cache.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful cache reload.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CACHE_LOAD Error while loading the cache.

simplesect.para: Not recommended to call this API frequently,if this API is called all the cache memory is reloaded by reading eFUSE array, reading eFUSE bit multiple times may diminish the life time.

listitem.para: Write 1 to load bit of eFuse_CACHE_LOAD register.
Wait for CACHE_DONE bit to set in EFUSE_STATUS register. If timed out return timeout error, else return XST_SUCCESS.
Read EFUSE_ISR_REG. If EFUSE_ISR_CACHE_ERROR is set return cache load error else return XST_SUCCES.
Reset EFUSE_ISR_CACHE_ERROR bit to 1.

briefdescription.para: This function disables power down of eFUSE macros.

listitem.para: Read EFUSE_PD_REG. If enable disable by writing EFUSE_PD_REG to 0.

inbodydescription.para: When changing the Power Down state, wait a separation period of 1us, before and after accessing the eFuse-Macro.

briefdescription.para: This function sets read mode of eFUSE controller.

parameterdescription.para: - Mode to be used for eFUSE read.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If Setting read mode is successful.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG register.
Read modify and write to EFUSE_CFG_REG to set the read mode.
Read back to check if the write is success, if success return XST_SUCCESS else return error.

briefdescription.para: This function sets reference clock of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: Set Reference clock for efuse by writing to EFUSE_REF_CLK_REG

briefdescription.para: This function enables programming mode of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Enable eFuse program mode by writing EFUSE_CFG_REG register

briefdescription.para: This function disables programming mode of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if eFUSE programming is disabled successfully.
XST_FAILURE - if there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS If eFUSE programming is disabled successfully.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Disable eFuse program mode by writing EFUSE_CFG_REG register and return XST_FAILURE on failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Disable eFuse program mode by writing EFUSE_CFG_REG register

briefdescription.para: This function disables Margin Read mode of eFUSE controller.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if resetting read mode is successful.
XST_FAILURE - if there is a failure
XST_SUCCESS If resetting read mode is successful.
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG
Reset Read mode from margin read mode by writing the EFUSE_CFG_REG
Read EFUSE_CFG_REG register.
Reset read mode from margin read mode by writing the EFUSE_CFG_REG.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes eFUSE controller timers.

listitem.para: Read reference clock frequency

briefdescription.para: This function setups eFUSE controller for given operation and read mode.

parameterdescription.para: - Read mode for eFUSE read operation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS eFUSE controller setup for given op.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_UNLOCK Failed to unlock eFUSE controller register access.
XST_FAILURE If eFUSE controller is not unlocked
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_PGM_TBIT_PATTERN If TBITS pattern is not matched with the expected value.
Unlock eFuse controller to write into eFuse registers.
Disable power down mode and set reference clock to eFuse.
Set read mode.
Initialize eFuse Timers.
Enable programming of Xilinx reserved eFuse.
Check for T bits for the expected pattern.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether Tbits are programmed or not.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On Success.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_PGM_TBIT_PATTERN Error in T-Bit pattern.
Read EFUSE_STATUS_REG register. Return error code if Read register value not equal to Tbit mask.

briefdescription.para: This function reads root register ID where measurement is stored in Root SysMon.

listitem.para: SupplyReg Id - On successful match found
XNVM_EFUSE_SEC_DEF_VAL_ALL_BIT_SET - When no matching supply found

briefdescription.para: This function performs the Temperature and Voltage checks to ensure that they are in limits before eFuse programming.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful Voltage and Temperature checks.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_INVALID_PARAM - Input validation failure.
XNVM_EFUSE_ERROR_READ_VOLTAGE_OUT_OF_RANGE - Voltage is out of range
XNVM_EFUSE_ERROR_READ_TEMPERATURE_OUT_OF_RANGE - Temperature is out of range
Unlock the sysmon register space
Get the sysmon supply register id.
If supply register id is 0xFFFFFFFF, supply is not enabled, return error.
If supplies are enabled for monitoring, get the new data for the supply. If no new data is available, return error.

inbodydescription.para: Else, clear the New data flag if its set

listitem.para: Read the raw voltage value from the supply.
Convert raw to voltage.
Check for voltage operating limits. Return error if voltage is not within operating limits.
Read the raw temperature value from the sysmon satellite.
Convert IntegralPart and FractionalPart to absolute values.
Check for temperature operating limits. Return error if temperature is not within operating limits.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the corresponding eFuse protection bits.

simplesect.para: Return protection bits value as specified by Mask

briefdescription.para: This file contains function declarations of eFUSE APIs.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
3.0 kal 07/16/2022 Initial release 3.1 skg 10/25/2022 Added comments for macros and enums 3.2 kum 04/11/2023 Moved Voltage and Temp macros for LP,MP,HP ranges from versal xnvm_efuse.h vss 09/19/2023 Fixed MISRA-C Rule 8.7 violation 3.3 vss 12/31/2023 Added support for Program the eFuse protection bits only once ng 11/22/2023 Fixed doxygen grouping
